tool.name: axtChain
tool.description: chain together axt or psl alignments
tool.command: axtChain -faQ -faT #if $in_aln.ext == "psl" -psl #end if #if $minScore -minScore='$minScore' #end if #if $scoreScheme -scoreScheme='$scoreScheme' #end if #if str($details_output) == "true" -details='$out_details' #end if #if str($linear_gap_options.linear_gap) == "linear_gap_file" -linearGap='${linear_gap_options.lineargap_input}' #else -linearGap=$linear_gap_options.linear_gap #end if <(gzip -cdfq '$in_aln') '$in_target' '$in_query' '$out'

param.name: in_aln
param.label: Alignments
param.help: Pairwise alignments in axt or psl format, optionally gzip-compressed. The format is detected automatically from the dataset; psl input enables axtChain's -psl option. Sequence names in the alignment must match the FASTA headers of the target and query below, e.g. hg38.chr1.

param.name: in_target
param.label: Target sequence
param.help: Make sure you are using the same name in both alignment and source sequence e.g. hg38.chr1.

param.name: in_query
param.label: Query sequence
param.help: Make sure you are using the same name in both alignment and source sequence e.g. mm39.chr1.

param.name: linear_gap
param.label: Linear gap costs
param.help: Penalty scheme for gaps when chaining. Use 'loose' for more divergent genomes (e.g. chicken/human), 'medium' for closer genomes (e.g. mouse/human), or supply a custom cost file.
param.option: Provide a dataset with linear gap costs

param.name: lineargap_input
param.label: Read the linear gap costs from
param.help: See help for an example file.

param.label: Minimum score for chain
param.help: Minimum score for a chain to be reported. Lower values keep more, weaker chains. Default: 1000.

param.label: Scoring matrix
param.help: Read the alignment scoring matrix from a blastz-format file. Leave unset to use axtChain's built-in scoring.

param.name: details_output
param.label: Output additional chain details
param.help: Writes an extra file with per-chain gap/scoring details.

tool.help:
`axtChain`_ chains together pairwise alignments in `axt`_ or `psl`_ format into the UCSC `chain`_ format, which describes a pairwise alignment that allows gaps in both sequences simultaneously.
The input format is detected automatically from the dataset; ``psl`` input is run through axtChain's ``-psl`` option. Optionally, an extra file with additional per-chain gap and scoring details can be produced (``-details``).
For implementation details see axtChain's `source code`_.
-----
Input *****
A single ``axt`` or ``psl`` alignment dataset (optionally gzip-compressed), together with the target and query genome FASTA files that were aligned to produce it.
Sequence names in the alignment must match the FASTA headers of the target and query, for example ``hg38.chr1``.
-----
Options *******
=============================== ============ =========== **Option** **Flag** **Default** ------------------------------- ------------ ----------- Minimum score for chain -minScore 1000 Scoring matrix (blastz format) -scoreScheme built-in Linear gap cost scheme -linearGap loose Output additional chain details -details off =============================== ============ ===========
The built-in ``-linearGap`` schemes use the following costs:
loose::
tablesize 11 smallSize 111 position 1 2 3 11 111 2111 12111 32111 72111 152111 252111 qGap 325 360 400 450 600 1100 3600 7600 15600 31600 56600 tGap 325 360 400 450 600 1100 3600 7600 15600 31600 56600 bothGap 625 660 700 750 900 1400 4000 8000 16000 32000 57000
medium::
tableSize 11 smallSize 111 position 1 2 3 11 111 2111 12111 32111 72111 152111 252111 qGap 350 425 450 600 900 2900 22900 57900 117900 217900 317900 tGap 350 425 450 600 900 2900 22900 57900 117900 217900 317900 bothGap 750 825 850 1000 1300 3300 23300 58300 118300 218300 318300
-----
Output ******
A ``chain`` dataset describing the chained alignments. When *Output additional chain details* is enabled, a second text dataset with per-chain gap and scoring details is also produced.
.. _axtChain: http://hgdownload.cse.ucsc.edu/admin/exe/linux.x86_64/FOOTER.txt .. _chain: https://genome.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/help/chain.html .. _axt: https://genome.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/help/axt.html .. _psl: https://genome.ucsc.edu/FAQ/FAQformat.html#format2 .. _source code: https://github.com/ucscGenomeBrowser/kent/blob/master/src/hg/mouseStuff/axtChain/axtChain.c
